mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month increase in industrial production signals a strengthening demand cycle that boosts corporate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the unemployment rate above 5.5% signals a weakening labor market that compresses wage growth and boosts corporate profitability, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in weakening periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in housing starts below 1.1 million signals a weakening supply cycle that boosts housing affordability and compresses mortgage rates, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in weakening periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the federal funds rate above 4.5% signals a tightening monetary cycle that boosts discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in real disposable personal income above 3% signals a strengthening demand cycle that boosts consumer spending and corporate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in strengthening periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in initial unemployment claims below 250k signals a strengthening labor market that boosts wage growth and compresses corporate profitability, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the GDP deflator above 2.5% signals a strengthening supply cycle that boosts inflation expectations and compresses bond yields, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in strengthening periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the GDP deflator below 1.5% signals a weakening monetary cycle that boosts bond yields and compresses equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in weakening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
